description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with a mix of white and dark gray exterior walls. The front includes a double garage with a wide driveway, and the property is enclosed by a low green hedge. The backyard boasts a spacious swimming pool surrounded by a patio area with lounge chairs and a small tree providing shade. Large windows and sliding glass doors open onto the pool area, creating a seamless indoor-outdoor living experience. The upper floor includes a balcony and additional living space, while the overall layout emphasizes open, functional spaces. The use of concrete, glass, and wood elements gives the bungalow a contemporary, minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a double garage, large windows, and a backyard pool, enclosed by a green hedge. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and a mix of concrete, glass, and wood materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, and hedge-lined driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the start of the backyard with the pool visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio area, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hedge boundary, pool area, and side entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rear-facing glass doors and scattered side windows
